sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ, user_data VARCHAR, value INT);
SELECT id, age(event_time) + (value & 15) AS combined_value FROM test_data WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, age(event_time) AS user_age, (value & (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data)) AS bitwise_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT id, user_data, age(event_time) AS age_info FROM test_data t1 JOIN (SELECT id, value & 3 AS bitwise_result FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT user_data, SUM(value) FROM test_data GROUP BY user_data HAVING age(event_time) > INTERVAL '1 year' AND SUM(value & 7) = 0;
WITH correlated AS (SELECT id, value, age(event_time) AS age_diff FROM test_data WHERE user_data IS NOT NULL) SELECT id, age_diff & value AS result FROM correlated;
ALTER TABLE test_data ADD COLUMN extra_data NUMERIC;
UPDATE test_data SET extra_data = value & 255 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, age(CAST(event_time AS TIMESTAMPTZ)) AS event_age, (user_data IS NULL)::INT & (value & 15) AS null_bitwise_value FROM test_data;
